name: CERUS CORP
business: The company develops and commercializes the INTERCEPT Blood System to enhance blood safety. It sells systems for platelets, plasma, and cryoprecipitation, and is developing a system for red blood cells. Products are sold via direct sales force and distributors to blood centers and hospitals in the U.S. and internationally.

exposures.sentence: We are a biomedical products company focused on developing and commercializing the INTERCEPT Blood System to enhance blood safety.

catalysts.event: Submit PMA application for new LED-based illuminator
catalysts.sentence: We plan to submit our PMA application for our new LED-based illuminator in mid-2026.

catalysts.event: Preliminary results from RedeS study expected
catalysts.sentence: The preliminary results from the RedeS study are expected in late 2026
